text:
(a) The department shall issue specialty license plates in honor of the Young Men’s Christian Association. The department shall design the license plates.

(b) After deduction of the department’s administrative costs, the remainder of the fee for issuance of the license plates shall be deposited to the credit of the YMCA account established by Section 7.025 (Ymca Account) , Education Code, as added by Chapter 869, Acts of the 77th Legislature, Regular Session, 2001.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 504. License Plates
##### § 504.623 — Texas Ymca

(a) The department shall issue specialty license plates in honor of the Young Men’s Christian Association. The department shall design the license plates.

(b) After deduction of the department’s administrative costs, the remainder of the fee for issuance of the license plates shall be deposited to the credit of the YMCA account established by Section 7.025 (Ymca Account) , Education Code, as added by Chapter 869, Acts of the 77th Legislature, Regular Session, 2001.

*Added by Acts 2003, 78th Leg., ch. 1320, Sec. 6, eff. Sept. 1, 2003.*

subsections.label: a
